hackathon: Global AI Hackathon Series with Qwen Cloud
prepared_head_policy: Do not treat any embedded local commit as final. Verify the local head with git rev-parse HEAD and the pushed public head with git ls-remote before any Devpost copy update.

pre_push_required_checks.label: Final local prepared head
pre_push_required_checks.purpose: Capture the exact local commit after all quality commits are complete.

pre_push_required_checks.label: Current public baseline
pre_push_required_checks.purpose: Confirm the public repository head after pushing.

pre_push_required_checks.label: Public side-effect approval
pre_push_required_checks.command: account owner explicitly approves any Devpost edit while present

reviewer_fast_path.label: Devpost project
reviewer_fast_path.purpose: Confirm submitted project identity and public video/deck links.

reviewer_fast_path.label: Demo Video
reviewer_fast_path.purpose: Watch the public demo linked from the submitted Devpost project.

reviewer_fast_path.label: Blog Award story
reviewer_fast_path.purpose: Review the product narrative, Qwen role, and Blog Post Award fit.

demo_video_fallbacks.label: Devpost-required hosted video
demo_video_fallbacks.purpose: Primary public demo URL accepted by the Qwen Devpost video field.

demo_video_fallbacks.label: Backup Pages-hosted WebM
demo_video_fallbacks.purpose: Silent public fallback for reviewers who cannot play the Vimeo page or embedded player. This is not a replacement for the Devpost-required hosted video.

judge_path.label: Devpost project
judge_path.purpose: Confirm submitted project identity and public video/deck links.

judge_path.label: Public evidence hub
judge_path.purpose: Start from the fastest public review path.

judge_path.label: Demo video
judge_path.purpose: Watch the public demo linked from the submitted project.

judge_path.label: Blog Award story
judge_path.purpose: Review the narrative route for the Blog Post Award.

judge_path.label: Judge review card
judge_path.purpose: Use the one-minute review card for award thesis, Qwen proof, and do-not-infer boundaries.

judge_path.label: Judge evidence pack
judge_path.purpose: Check Track 4 fit, award thesis, and completed-vs-pending evidence.

judge_path.label: Qwen contribution and live proof
judge_path.purpose: Inspect how Qwen refines PrizePilot decisions and where the live smoke proof is recorded.

judge_path.label: Qwen before/after evidence
judge_path.purpose: Compare deterministic route planning with the Qwen-refined public copy and proof boundary.

judge_path.label: Official Requirement Fit
judge_path.purpose: Map official Qwen Cloud requirements and judging signals to public evidence, prepared code proof, and the remaining Alibaba endpoint gate.

judge_path.label: Award Thesis Scorecard
judge_path.purpose: Review the ranked Blog Post Award, Honorable Mention, and Track 4 thesis without treating it as a win-probability claim.

judge_path.label: Blog Share Packet
judge_path.purpose: Review safe public share copy for the Blog Post Award route.

judge_path.label: Public update checklist
judge_path.purpose: Confirm local checks, public link checks, and claim boundaries before any Devpost copy update.

judge_path.label: Alibaba endpoint checklist
judge_path.purpose: Verify that live Alibaba endpoint proof remains pending rather than overclaimed.

judge_path.label: Public update digest
judge_path.purpose: Review the repository update packet, public baseline, and do-not-claim boundaries before any Devpost copy update.

official_requirement_fit.evidence: src/prizepilot/qwen_client.py, tests, qwen-live-proof, qwen-contribution map, and qwen-before-after evidence
agent planner, webapp dashboard, static plan JSON, judge demo, approval queue, and evidence gap register
deploy/alibaba-cloud/s.yaml, deployment runbook, proof template, and endpoint checklist
Devpost project, repository, license, README, architecture diagram, Vimeo demo, deck, public blog, and judge hub

completed_evidence: Public repository, Pages hub, demo video, and presentation deck are live.
Backup Pages-hosted WebM demo is available for reviewer playback fallback.
Static judge demo and public plan snapshot are available without login.
Qwen-compatible client shape is implemented and locally testable.
Qwen/DashScope live smoke proof has been recorded without storing secrets.
Qwen before/after evidence maps deterministic planning to Qwen-refined public copy.
Official Requirement Fit map connects Qwen rules and judging signals to public evidence while preserving the endpoint boundary.
Judge review card, Award Thesis Scorecard, Blog Share Packet, and public update checklist are prepared for faster review and safer publishing.
Blog Post Award story, benchmark method, award preflight, and evidence map are prepared.

pending_evidence.reason: Requires account-owner approval for Alibaba Cloud account, region, credits or billing, deployment, and public endpoint verification.
Public Devpost edits are external side effects and must only describe evidence that actually exists.

alibaba_code_proof.boundary: This is repository code proof for an Alibaba Function Compute deployment path, not live endpoint proof. Live proof starts only after a public Alibaba URL returns HTTP 200 at / and /api/plan.

do_not_infer: Do not infer that PrizePilot has won a prize.
Do not infer that payout, tax, KYC, billing, or bank setup is complete.
Do not infer that a live Alibaba public endpoint exists until a public HTTP 200 URL is recorded.
Do not infer that API keys, cookies, account-local storage, or private console data are stored in the repository.
